characters.name: Abrupto
characters.description: AbruptoProfileClassTrogGenderMaleProfessional StatusAffiliationDownlandPersonal StatusOriginDownlandFamilyGargantua(brother)RelationshipsX (ex-girlfriend)[1]DebutCartoonPrincess AmentiaVoice Actors4KidsStephen Kilcullen[2] Abruptois a citizen ofDownlandand PrincessAmentia's guard. He is an imposing size, easily towering over Brandon and Sponsus. He is well-built per his position as a guard and has pale-yellow skin tone, red eyes, and his dark blue hair is in a high bun. Like his fellow trogs, only his thumb and index finger are separate limbs. He is very mean-spirited, especially towardSponsus. He takes any opportunity to stop Sponsus from talking and seems rather uninterested in what he has to say. According to Sponsus, Abrupto wasn't always this mean, but changed after his girlfriend broke up with him rather abruptly.[3]
characters.personality_section: He is very mean-spirited, especially towardSponsus. He takes any opportunity to stop Sponsus from talking and seems rather uninterested in what he has to say. According to Sponsus, Abrupto wasn't always this mean, but changed after his girlfriend broke up with him rather abruptly.[3]

characters.name: Accordiphant
characters.description: TheAccordiphantis a species ofFairy Animalintroduced inSeason 7. It is a cheerfulFairy Animalwhich likes to make friends with other fairy animals. It also appears to be a little naive and curious. The Accordiphant looks like normal elephants but smaller in size, and it earns butterfly-wing-shaped ears and helmet-like feature that matches the color of the ears, covers its forehead as well as the back of its head while its body resembles accordions' bellows. Its face, trunk, and hooves are usually grayish blue/light gray. The body is in a darker shade in comparison to the face, trunk, or hooves. Its eyes are brown. Its butterfly-wing-shaped ears and helmet-like feature are in light orange/gold color, while the edges of the ears have a darker shade or pinkish-orange/gold color, and the veins of the ears are in purple.

characters.name: Ace
characters.description: AceWorld of WinxComicsProfileClassHumanGenderMaleProfessional StatusAffiliationEarthOccupationTV Show HostPersonal StatusOriginEarthRelationshipsMargotandCliff(colleagues)The WinxandLorelei(former employees)DebutCartoonThe Talent ThiefComic#156: The Talent ShowLast AppearanceCartoonThe Fall of the QueenComic#156: The Talent ShowVoice ActorsItalianNanni BaldiniDuArt/3BeepJason GriffithGallery Aceis the host of the reality talent show,Wow!He also acts akin to that of the Winx's boss throughoutSeason 1ofWorld of Winx. Ace has light pink skin, an angular face, gray hair with white flocks, and a matching goatee. On TV, Ace appears to be nice, friendly, and flamboyant. But in reality, he is very greedy, selfish, and easily agitated. He has been described as odd.[1] With theWinx, Ace acts bossy and they say he is annoying, and he especially butts heads with Bloom, who increasingly gets on his nerves on the show, later to the point of firing her. It is not known if Ace really appreciates or wants the Winx, given how often he belittles them and voices his poor opinion of their performance. However, at the end of the season one, he does offer a sincere welcome to Bloom once she returns to the show, implying that he does at least have some respect for the Winx (although this could also be because his patience with Bloom and later Lorelei was severely tried during the season and he was acting strangely under a spell).

characters.description: AdagildeProfileClassWitchGenderFemaleProfessional StatusPowers and AbilitiesWitches' MagicDark MagicDebutCartoonMission at Cloudtower(mentioned)Last AppearanceCartoonMission at Cloudtower Adagildeis awitchwho was mentioned inseason 1as a book about her was found inCloud Towerarchives. characters.name: Adrian
characters.description: AdrianProfileClassHumanGenderMaleProfessional StatusAffiliationMagixRed FountainEraklyonOccupationLieutenantSpy (briefly)Personal StatusOriginEraklyonRelationshipsBloom(crush)DebutComic#44: The Loyalty GameLast AppearanceComic#45: Suspicion and Deceit Adrianis a character exclusively featured within theWinx Club Comic Series. Making his debut inIssue 44, Adrian becomes the newest waiter at theWhite Horse Caféuntil he is revealed to be a spy sent fromEraklyonto investigate a potential rebel assault onCrown Prince Skyand protect him from it. He is also a brief love interest ofBloom's. Adrian has an average build, a light skin tone, short and somewhat messy greyish-brown hair and matching greyish-brown eyes. He has also been described as quite handsome byTecna,Stellaand most of theWhite Horse's female patrons. He is a nice guy who can be clueless at times,NimeriaandPulisatillaflirted with him and wanted his attention while he was just confused about the situation. He has also been shown to be a bit bashful.
characters.personality_section: He is a nice guy who can be clueless at times,NimeriaandPulisatillaflirted with him and wanted his attention while he was just confused about the situation. He has also been shown to be a bit bashful.

characters.name: Aguine
characters.description: AguineProfileClassHumanGenderFemaleDebutCartoonMiss MagixLast AppearanceCartoonMiss Magix Aguine[1]is a character introduced inSeason 1. She has fringy flower skin, large black eyes, her "eyebrows" are three circles (going from small to the large) and are Aquamarine, has London Hue colored lips, and thick, fountain blue hair. Not much is known about Aguine other than being passionate about her talent.
characters.personality_section: Not much is known about Aguine other than being passionate about her talent.

characters.name: Ahisa
characters.description: AhisaTitleFairy of Love[1][2]ProfileClassFairyGenderFemaleProfessional StatusAffiliationAlfeaPowers and AbilitiesFairies' MagicLight MagicOccupationStudentPersonal StatusRelationshipsKimmy,Mirta,Amaryl,Alice,Selene, andFrancis(friends/classmates)DebutCartoonThe Shadow PhoenixLast AppearanceCartoonNew Magic HarmonyGallery Ahisa[3]is the Fairy of Love[1][2]and who attendsAlfea. Ahisa is a lightly tanned skin girl with dark-colored eyes and pale-colored lipstick/lip-gloss worn. Her hair is dark blue, appearing almost black with neatly brushed bangs and short, shoulder-length bits of hair in front of her ears. She is feisty and confident. She is shown to be brave when she helps fighting against the mind controlledwitchesinseason 3and helpingRoxyfight theTrixinseason 7.
characters.personality_section: She is feisty and confident. She is shown to be brave when she helps fighting against the mind controlledwitchesinseason 3and helpingRoxyfight theTrixinseason 7.

She is the Crown Princess ofAndros, as well as itsGuardian Fairy. Aisha joins theWinx Clubas its sixth member in thesecond season, and she is an alumna/student of theAlfea College for Fairies. Aisha is a self-confident and talented athlete who excels at dancing and swimming. Aisha is a dark-skinned girl with a medium brown complexion, long, curly mahogany brown hair, and cerulean eyes. She has very full lips, and often she uses pink lipstick.

She is the Crown Princess ofAndros, as well as itsGuardian Fairy. Aisha joins theWinx Clubas its sixth member in thesecond season, and she is an alumna/student of theAlfea College for Fairies. Aisha is a self-confident and talented athlete who excels at dancing and swimming. Aisha is a dark-skinned girl with a medium brown complexion, long, curly mahogany brown hair, and cerulean eyes. She has very full lips, and often she uses pink lipstick.

characters.name: Aisha's Guardian of Sirenix
characters.description: Aisha's Guardian of SirenixProfileClassGuardian of SirenixGenderFemaleProfessional StatusPowers and AbilitiesGrantingAisha'sSirenix WishPersonal StatusFairyAishaDebutCartoonSirenixLast AppearanceCartoonInspiration of SirenixVoice ActorsAtlas Oceanic (Nickelodeon)April StewartGallery Aisha's Guardian of Sirenixis one of theGuardiansofSirenixfeatured inSeason 5and6. She has turquoise hair, violet eyes, and dark turquoise eyelashes. She has pale turquoise skin and a pale-purple shell on her forehead. She wears a purple and turquoise shell-shaped top. Her tail is turquoise with light pink ribbons on it. On her right arm, she also wears pale pink ribbons. Aisha's Sirenix Guardian is the most informal Sirenix Guardian among the six. In "Faraway Reflections," when the Winx are trying to find the Eye of Inspiration,Aishaunleashed her Sirenix Guardian. Her Guardian of Sirenix said "duh" at the end of her riddle. Just like her fellow Guardians of Sirenix, she is wise enough to know the desire of Aisha: To saveNereus' life.

characters.name: Aisha
characters.description: Princess AishaSeriesComicsTitlePrincess Aisha of Andros[1]Fairy of Waves[1]Fairy of Waves and Water[2]Fairy of Fluids[3]ProfileClassFairyGenderFemaleAge (at first appearance)16[4]Professional StatusAffiliationAlfeaWinx ClubSpecialistsAndrosPowers and AbilitiesFairies' MagicHydrokinesisSignaturePersonal StatusOriginAndrosFamilyTeredorandNiobe(parents)RelationshipsWinx(best friends)DebutCartoon[Winx Club: The Magic is Back  - Episode 101Comic#254: A New Fairy!GameWinx Club: MagixVoice ActorsItalianLaura LenghiDuArt/3BeepZuri WashingtonGallery Princess AishaofAndrosis the Fairy of Waves[1]and one of the main protagonists ofWinx Club: The Magic is Back. Aisha is a girl with a dark skin, olive eyes, and black waist length hair styled in braids. Part of it is tied in the back. She has defined abdominal muscles. Aisha is driven, focused, loyal, strong, and competitive She carries herself with dignity as she is a princess, but is often under a great amount of pressure because of her title. This does not stop her from having her own dreams that she hopes to fulfill and being free from this setback.[1]However, she can be quite stubborn.

This does not stop her from having her own dreams that she hopes to fulfill and being free from this setback.[1]However, she can be quite stubborn.

characters.name: Aki Abe
characters.description: Aki AbeProfileClassHumanGenderFemaleProfessional StatusAffiliationNinjin RestaurantEarthOccupationChefPersonal StatusOriginEarthRelationshipsMusaandAisha(acquaintance)DebutCartoonThe Chef ContestLast AppearanceCartoonThe Chef Contest Aki Abeis a character that appears inWorld of Winx. She was one of the participants ofGardenia's cooking challenge. She has medium-tone skin, long dark brown hair rolled up in a bun, and brown eyes. She wears a black and white kimono top and a red apron. Aki is a calm and quiet woman. She is shown to be polite, mature, and kind. She's a good sport as she accepted it when Vincenzo won the cooking competition

characters.name: Alba
characters.description: AlbaTitleFairy of SnowProfileClassFairyGenderFemaleProfessional StatusAffiliationWinx ClubGardenia, EarthPowers and AbilitiesFairies' MagicLight MagicCryokinesisPersonal StatusOriginEarth,GardeniaRelationshipsWinx Club(ally)DebutComic#188: Magic at High AltitudeLast AppearanceComic#188: Magic at High Altitude Albais the Fairy of Snow and is fromEarth. She is acomicexclusive character. Alba has pale skin, brown eyes, and short brown hair. She wears a pink winter jacket with a thick red collar, on the left sleeve is a white circle logo with a blue outline and two snowy mountains. Her pants are orange with raglan pockets and she wears blue winter mountain boots. Alba accessorizes with a blue beanie and blue snowboard goggles. Blue binoculars hangs around her neck and she wears blue mittens. Alba is a determined and slightly hot-tempered girl but can keep a cool head during dangerous situations. She loves nature and is ready to protect it. Alba is smart and resourceful having deduced what needed to be done to fix her mistake. A naturally friendly and courageous person. She also likes tobogganing.

characters.name: Alberto
characters.description: AlbertoProfileClassSpecialistGenderMaleProfessional StatusAffiliationRed FountainSkills, Abilities, and WeaponsCurved DaggersDebutCartoonSecrets Within SecretsComic#12: Magic BattleGameWinx ClubLast AppearanceCartoonThe Show Must Go On!Comic#12: Magic BattleGameWinx Club Alberto[1]is aSpecialistwho attendsRed Fountain. Alberto is a fair-skinned young man. Like the otherSpecialists, he has a well-built body. His eyes are violet like his eyebrows. He has six small dots on his forehead. He is bald except for a short purple ponytail on the top of his head, which is similar children's hairstyle in Ancient Egypt. Alberto is a serious and brave fighter, shown when he helped fight off theArmy of Darkness.
characters.personality_section: Alberto is a serious and brave fighter, shown when he helped fight off theArmy of Darkness.

characters.name: Alexia
characters.description: Queen AlexiaProfileClassHumanGenderFemaleProfessional StatusAffiliationHer KingdomEarth(simulation)Personal StatusOriginEarthFamilyKing Beldar(husband)RelationshipsUkrain(former advisor; enemy)Marquis Alarik(enemy)Winx Club(allies)DebutComic#34: A Story of Knights and LadiesLast AppearanceComic#34: A Story of Knights and Ladies Queen Alexiais a character exclusive to thecomic series. She is the queen of her country who is tortured by the thoughts that her beloved may be gone forever. Alexia's position to rule is threatened byUkrain, her advisor, who wants to steal the throne should she fail to marry and produce an heir. She is a character that was formed for the purpose ofthe Winx's reality simulation exercise atAlfea. Alexia is a calm and graceful person. She is also intelligent and loves her people. Being there with her subjects and admiring them was enough for her to be happy, and she wanted to actually become closer to them. She is not easily fooled by her adviser's "advice," as she is aware that he has plans to steal her throne whenever he has the chance. Alexia is patient as it seemed that she had been waiting for her beloved Beldar to return as he had been away for a long time.

characters.name: Alfea Champions
characters.description: Alfea ChampionsMembersRess, Chevonne and FarceliaAffiliationMagixPixies(formerly)AlfeaPowers and AbilitiesFairies' MagicVarious PowersetsElemental ControlTeleportationOriginMagix(presumably)First AppearanceLegendary DuelLatest AppearanceLegendary Duel TheAlfea Championswere an ancient trio of legendary fairies who were believed to be the most powerful fairies in all ofMagixhistory. Their feats have been known to be passed down through generations, and had been recorded in theLegendarium. They are a group of three fairies includeRess of the Flame,Chevonne of the WaterandFarcelia of the Wind. Not much is known about their early history, except that they achieved so many feats and rose to be the most powerfulfairies. According toDaphne, they are the strongest fairies inMagixhistory, so strong that they refused to bond with thepixies.

characters.name: Algae
characters.description: Queen AlgaeTitleQueen Algae of the Aquatic Fairies[1]Fairy of Algae[2]ProfileClassUndineGenderFemaleProfessional StatusAffiliationUndinesPowers and AbilitiesNature[2]Personal StatusOriginBlack Mud Swamp,MagixDebutCartoonThe Monster and the WillowBookI Want to Be a FairyLast AppearanceCartoonThe Monster and the WillowBookGuida al Mondo MagicoVoice ActorsItalianLudovica Marineo Queen Algae[1]is the queen of theUndineswho lives inBlack Mud Swampfound nearLake RoccaluceinMagix. She is the Fairy of Algae.[2] Queen Algae, like all theUndines, looks like a miniaturemermaidwith flaps of transparent skin under her arms that allow her to fly and all her fingers except the thumb are fused together. The Queen of the Undines is cheerful, kind, wise[1]and understanding. She cares a lot for her people and for nature and sometimes shows some slights forms of humor. She is very serene even when she is worried.

characters.name: Alice
characters.description: Alice(also:Jenny[1])Winx ClubComicsTitleFairy of Ice[2]ProfileClassFairyGenderFemaleProfessional StatusAffiliationAlfeaPowers and AbilitiesCryokinesisFairies' MagicLight MagicOccupationStudentPersonal StatusRelationshipsJared(boyfriend)Miky,Silicya,Ahisa,Kimmy,Amaryl,Oleana,Francine, andKarina(friends/classmates)DebutCartoonStorming Cloud TowerComic#45: Suspicion and DeceitLast AppearanceCartoonNew Magic HarmonyComic#59: Winx BandVoice ActorsItalianClarice Dias4KidsVeronica TaylorGallery Alice[3]is a fairy who attendsAlfeaand the Fairy of Ice.[2] She is an elegant-looking girl with long, grayish-blue hair that is somewhat curly. Her lips appear pink, while her eyeshadow seems purple. Her eyes look to be blue-gray. Alice is shown to be nice, and at times is flirtatious. But she is also shown to be brave as she helpsAlfeafight certain enemies.
characters.personality_section: Alice is shown to be nice, and at times is flirtatious. But she is also shown to be brave as she helpsAlfeafight certain enemies.

characters.name: Alice
characters.description: Alice(also:Isabel / Sarah[1])Winx ClubComicsProfileClassFairyGenderFemaleProfessional StatusAffiliationAlfeaPowers and AbilitiesFairies' MagicLight MagicOccupationStudentPersonal StatusRelationshipsWinx(idols)Clarice(friend/roommate)MarziaandTrista(friends)Jordan(ex-boyfriend; comics-only)DebutCartoonThe Mirror of TruthComic#30: Love for LaylaLast AppearanceCartoonIt's a Crazy, Crazy WorldComic#59: Winx BandVoice ActorsAtlas Oceanic (Nickelodeon)Saige Ryan Campbell (Season 4)Kimberly Brooks (Season 6)Gallery Alice[2]is a freshman fairy atAlfeainSeason 3. She is one ofClarice's roommates. She is also one of the students who stays in theWinx's old room inSeason 4. She also seems to be one of the Winx fans and is impressed by them as they areEnchantixFairies. Alice has wavy orange hair pulled back into a loose ponytail and held by a blue scrunchie. She has a side hair partition and has bangs that come in front of her eyes. UnlikeClaricewho is quick to judge and dislike people, Alice is friendlier, not very confrontational, and giddy showing great excitement when she learns that theWinxare her teachers. She can however, be brave as shown when she witnessed theWizards of the Black CirclehurtingFlora, she was quick to confront them. She is also persistent, righteous and is capable of disregarding how people perceive her to be. Alice has a kind heart and a forgiving soul as she desperately and succeeded in convincingGriseldanot a expel Clarice even after the latter framed her for the smoke bomb incident.

characters.name: Allan
characters.description: AllanProfileClassHumanGenderMalePersonal StatusRelationshipsLuna(girlfriend; comic only)DebutComic#7: The School for Witches(mentioned)#30: Love for Layla(physically)Last AppearanceComic#30: Love for Layla Allanis the boyfriend of QueenLunaafter her divorce from KingRadiusin thecomics. Allan has brown hair, sideburns, and a beard. He is seen wearing a blue shirt, pants, and shoes. Allan is a genuinely nice person. He also tried to be friendly towardsStella(though the princess was still very bitter towards him), to show her he truly means no harm. It seems that when he is caught up in an awkward position, he sweats profusely (e.g. Stella's obvious displeasure towards him). According to Luna, he is thoughtful and nice to her. He is trusting, but it does not mean he trusts people blindly and will put said person to the test. He will also award them for their honesty. This is seen when he trusted Stella that she would not abuse his kindness, and as a reward, he gifted her with the first dress she tried on.

characters.name: Alligator Man
characters.description: Alligator ManProfileClassLizardmanGenderMalePersonal StatusFamilyCrocodile Man(brother)DebutCartoonThe Alligator ManLast AppearanceCartoonOld Friends and New Enemies TheAlligator Manis a character inWorld of Winx. He is the brother of theCrocodile Man. Alligator Man is an anthropomorphic alligator with a humanoid body and the head, claws and tail of a prehistoric alligator. He is muscular, and has red eyes. He seems to be very close to his brother, they get along very well. The alligator man seems to possess, like his brother, a certain intelligence. He is able to understand the importance of acting to ward off imaginary homesickness.
characters.personality_section: He seems to be very close to his brother, they get along very well. The alligator man seems to possess, like his brother, a certain intelligence. He is able to understand the importance of acting to ward off imaginary homesickness.

characters.name: Alyssa
characters.description: AlyssaWinx ClubComicsProfileClassHumanGenderFemalePersonal StatusOriginLinpheaFamilyRhodos(husband)Flora,Miele(daughters)Helia(possible future son-in-law)DebutCartoonMythix(physically)Adventure On Lynphea(speaking)Comic#160: A Dive on LynpheaBookGuida al Mondo MagicoLast AppearanceCartoonBeware of the WolfComic#160: A Dive on LynpheaBookGuida al Mondo MagicoVoice ActorsItalianRachele PaolelliGallery AlyssaisRhodos' wife andFloraandMiele's mother and she first appears inSeason 6when she goes toAlfeafor Mother's Day. She shares some similarities withFlorain appearance, which are tan skin and brown hair and eye shape. She has brown eyes and her hair is long and stays in a bun with some green highlights, decorated by purple flowers. Alyssa has great knowledge of all the flowers and plants of the magical dimension. She is seen as very cheery, friendly and is shown to usually be in a good mood. She is also very overprotective of her garden, not wantingAmarokanywhere near her plants. She is also protective of her children. But as she hasn't made many appearances not much else is known about her.

characters.name: Amaranth
characters.description: Lord AmaranthYoung FaceTrue FaceProfileClassVampireGenderMaleProfessional StatusAffiliationAmaranth CaféPowers and AbilitiesVampiric PowersHypnosisLife Energy AbsorptionLife Energy BestowalDuplicationEternal YouthSkills, Abilities, and WeaponsMagical OrchidsSilver PendantOccupationFormer Owner of the Amaranth CaféPersonal StatusOriginEarthRelationshipsUnnamed Vampire Coven (former pawns)Mina(former pawn)Flora(bride; under hypnosis)DebutComic#92: The Club of VampiresLast AppearanceComic#92: The Club of Vampires Lord Amaranthis a character exclusively featured within theWinx Club Comic Series. He makes his debut during theHallowinx mini-seriesinIssue 92: The Club of Vampiresas the owner of the vampiric Amaranth Café. Later, it is revealed that Amaranth plots to use the Silver Pendant that theWinxobtained from thewerewolvesin Shady Hill to take control over humans and werewolves much like he did his fellowvampires. In his younger form, he has black hair. He wears a red and black cape.
